summary: Iteration 67 - Wealth Command v7.3.0 Phase 6, 7, 8 Complete Testing. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed duplicate ClientPortal import in App.js. Verified Meeting Automation Engine (process transcripts, generate tasks/emails), Batch Execution (one-click actions, preview/execute trades), Client Portal (net worth, portfolios, goals), and AI Copilot Advanced (natural language queries, quick insights).

issues: Compliance modal appears on every page load - consider persisting 'Don't show again' state in localStorage

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed duplicate ClientPortal import in App.js (was declared at line 99 and 152)
All v7.3.0 Phase 6, 7, 8 features working correctly
Health endpoint reports 28 capabilities including new features
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all APIs use in-memory demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified all v7.3.0 Phase 6, 7, 8 features: Meeting Automation Engine (meeting-to-everything), Batch Execution (one-click rebalancing/tax harvesting), Client Portal (James Wheeler demo with $2.9M net worth), AI Copilot Advanced (natural language queries). Fixed duplicate ClientPortal import bug. All data is MOCKED/DEMO stored in memory.

mocked_apis.Meeting_Automation: MOCKED - In-memory storage for meetings, tasks, emails
mocked_apis.Batch_Execution: MOCKED - 5 demo clients with simulated trades, Alpaca in demo mode
mocked_apis.Client_Portal: MOCKED - James Wheeler demo client with $2.9M net worth, 3 goals, 2 portfolios
mocked_apis.AI_Copilot_Advanced: MOCKED - Pattern-matching responses with demo client data

features_verified.frontend_meeting_automation: WORKING - /meeting-automation loads with form and stats
features_verified.frontend_batch_execution: WORKING - /batch-execution loads with 3 action cards and Alpaca badge

features_verified.frontend_ai_copilot: WORKING - /ai-copilot-advanced loads with chat and insights sidebar

bug_fixed.issue: SyntaxError: Identifier 'ClientPortal' has already been declared (152:6)

bug_fixed.fix: Removed duplicate import at line 152 and duplicate route at line 983
